content.text: As of the latest data, Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is trading at $83,065.81, making it the highest-valued asset among the listed cryptocurrencies. Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) follows with a current price of $1,816.02. Solana (SOL) is priced at $117.07, while ai16z, a lower-cap digital asset, is trading at $0.15796.
